recital.description: Combined name | type of entity | jurisdiction | effective date for one party to a merger or share exchange (FIRST recital block on MBCA-10). Free-form string — form does not provide separate column widgets despite the four-column header label.

name_and_type.description: Combined party name + type of entity at the head of a per-party signature block on page 2.

date_signed.description: Date a specific party to the merger signed.

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name + capacity of one of (typically two) authorized signers for a party. Two signer slots per party because some entity types under 13-C §1106.8 require two officer/manager signatures.

additional_parties_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating additional merger parties are attached on an exhibit (used when there are >4 parties).

additional_parties_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit containing additional-parties recital.

name_and_jurisdiction.description: Name and jurisdiction of incorporation of the surviving/acquiring entity (combined into one widget on this form despite a two-column header label).

physical_address.description: Address of the surviving entity's principal place of business (where the executed plan of merger is on file). Single-line.

mailing_address.description: Optional mailing address for the surviving entity's principal place of business.

fourth_election.description: Mutually-exclusive enum for FOURTH paragraph: 'survivor_originating_doc_amended' (option 1, requires merger.survivor_amendments_exhibit_letter) or 'new_corporation_created' (option 2, requires merger.new_corporation_provisions_exhibit_letter and an attached MBCA-6-1 if domestic).

survivor_amendments_exhibit_letter.description: Exhibit letter for amendments to the surviving entity's originating document (FOURTH option 1).

new_corporation_provisions_exhibit_lette.description: Exhibit letter for provisions required in a newly-created corporation's public organic document (FOURTH option 2).

future_effective_date.description: Optional future effective date for the merger or share exchange. If blank, the filing date applies.

sixth_election.description: Mutually-exclusive enum for SIXTH (shareholder approval): 'shareholder_approval_obtained' (option 1, plan duly approved per Title 13-C and articles) or 'shareholder_approval_not_required' (option 2). Both checkboxes have unnamed /T on this template (filler engine binds by index/rect).

seventh_election.description: Mutually-exclusive enum for SEVENTH (foreign-party authorization): 'foreign_corp_authorized' (option 1, organic law of foreign corporation authorizes participation) or 'eligible_entity_authorized' (option 2, organic law of eligible entity authorizes). Set when the merger involves a foreign corporation or eligible entity.

service_of_process_mailing_address.description: Mailing address to which the Maine Secretary of State may mail process served on the SOS as agent for a foreign-survivor entity (EIGHTH paragraph appointment under §1106).

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
